cases.description: Verify E1M10 / UMAPINFO id24_levelnum ordering and intermission conditions.
Verify EnterAnim / ExitAnim parsing and presentation-only behavior.
Verify MinRespawnTics and RespawnDice defaults, VM exposure, save serialization, and runtime respawn gate.
Verify highest ID24-promised thing/state/sprite slots parse and spawn/render.
Verify every ID24-specific flag is supported, mapped, missing, or intentionally rejected.
